member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.PowerFx.ExpressionEngineProvider
member.summary: A container that allows for RecalcEngine compiler customization and caching.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.PowerFx.ExpressionEngineProvider.RecalcEngineCache._namingConflicts
member.summary: Key: Name of the option set causing a naming conflict Value: true if the option set conflicts with a system name.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.PowerFx.FileDataContent
member.summary: PowerFX BlobContent version wrapping a Copilot Studio File Reference object

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.PowerFx.Visitors.AmbiguousPath
member.summary: Represents a potentially ambiguous path property path

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.PowerFx.Visitors.FindDependenciesVisitor
member.summary: Collects all the referenced state as objects for a given formula without a binder. This can be used to determine the order in which to resolve formulas.
member.remarks:
We collect and return a list of paths for any given expression. Certain functions create multiple valid state paths from a single node. Example: If (A, B, C).Name references both B.Name and C.Name depending on the value of A.
Operations such as With, As, or Sum create scopes, which are stored in the dictionary that is input to the visitor. As an example, the With({x: 5}, x) does not reference any external state, since x is defined within the expression.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.PowerFx.Visitors.PowerFxValueToDataValueConverterWithoutTimeZone.#ctor(Microsoft.Agents.ObjectModel.Expressions.IExpressionCheckerOperationContext)
member.summary: Do not use, instead, use the static method.
member.remarks: This constructor is made private, since this class is not thread safe and should be newed up for each call or cached per thread.
